problem id: 4c06f388
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(5)

examples:
  00100011 -> 00110101
  11010100 -> 00000110
  11011010 -> 00100110
  10000101 -> 11100111
  00010100 -> 10000111
  01010111 -> 00001110
  00000001 -> 11111001
  01000011 -> 01110110
  00001101 -> 11010001
  01001010 -> 01000010

query: 01011011
predicted answer: 00100110
